home.lead: Quizzes that do not judge you. Plus a library with every path — university, self-taught, founder.

tests.label: Real scenarios
tests.description: Replaces Quick Quiz. It reads concrete reactions, not abstract self-descriptions.

tests.label: Short personality
tests.description: A first profile for energy, structure, curiosity, and how you work with people.

tests.label: IPIP-NEO-60
tests.description: The serious version for the detailed report. Longer, but much more relevant.

tests.label: Vocational
tests.description: Find what kinds of activities attract you: building, researching, creating, helping, leading, or organizing.

home.placeholderLead: This route exists for deep links and campaigns. We will implement the questions after validating the landing page.
home.libraryLead: Results should be able to recommend university, trade school, self-taught, creator, founder, or a mixed path. That remains the product direction.
